title: Managing Mythos
summary_en: WashU cybersecurity expert Ning Zhang explains the growing capabilities of machine learning models such as Mythos and their threat to internet infrastructure and security.
title_cn: 人工智能企业Anthropic筹备发布克劳德“神话”基础模型 牵头实施“玻璃翼项目”强化网络安全防御

title: Class Acts: Izzy Caffarelli
summary_en: Isabella Caffarelli, a senior majoring in applied mathematics and minoring in astrophysics in Arts & Sciences, is looking forward to a new research challenge after she graduates from WashU: helping brain scientists use advanced algorithms to sort and understand neurological data in a cleaner, more coherent way.
title_cn: 华盛顿大学（圣路易斯）优秀学子伊莎贝拉（伊齐）·卡法雷利将赴美国国立卫生研究院任职

title: Class Acts: Hongzhe (Zachary) Wen
summary_en: During his time at WashU, Hongzhe (Zachary) Wen, a senior majoring in finance and financial engineering at Olin Business School, built a trove of academic research that demonstrates the potential for integrating digital assets into the financial mainstream while addressing associated risks.
title_cn: 华盛顿大学奥林商学院学子文宏哲相关加密货币研究取得进展 毕业后将入职Coinbase

title: For the tiniest babies, making the best use of antibiotics
summary_en: A decadeslong research collaboration at WashU Medicine has led to a reduction in antibiotic use in preemies in the neonatal intensive care unit at St. Louis Children’s Hospital.
title_cn: 圣路易斯儿童医院联合华盛顿大学医学院优化极早早产儿抗菌药物使用规范

title: Steven Isserlis and Connie Shih perform April 30
summary_en: British cellist Steven Isserlis and Canadian pianist Connie Shih will perform the music of Beethoven, Schumann, Kabalevsky and Kaprálová Thursday, April 30, as part of WashU’s Great Artists Series.
title_cn: 圣路易斯华盛顿大学“大艺术家系列”将于4月30日举办史蒂文·伊瑟利斯与施康妮独奏音乐会

title: Class Acts: ‘Sri’ Gopalsamy Ramaswamy
summary_en: At WashU, Sri Gopalsamy Ramaswamy combines public health and business to examine why care falls short — and how to design solutions that reach patients.
title_cn: 华盛顿大学（圣路易斯）公卫专业学子运用商学思维推动医疗照护落地实践

title: Class Acts: Dierdre Lockette
summary_en: Dierdre Lockette grew up passionate about writing, but sensible about her financial future, so she chose a career in accounting. Three decades later, Lockette is completing her undergraduate degree from the WashU School of Continuing & Professional Studies, where she has discovered a new passion: research.
title_cn: 华盛顿大学（圣路易斯）学子迪尔德丽·洛克特通过经济学研究开拓学术新视野

title: Public Health & Society major draws strong student interest
summary_en: The Arts & Sciences-based program meets rising demand, combining rigorous interdisciplinary study with hands-on community experience, preparing students to tackle complex health challenges across fields.
title_cn: 华盛顿大学（圣路易斯）公共卫生与社会专业受到学生广泛青睐

title: Charlie White appointed dean of Sam Fox School
summary_en: Charlie White, the highly regarded artist and academic leader whose vision and student advocacy have helped to build nationally recognized programs at Carnegie Mellon University and the University of Southern California, has been named the Ralph J. Nagel Dean of WashU’s Sam Fox School, announced Chancellor Andrew D. Martin.
title_cn: 圣路易斯华盛顿大学任命查理·怀特为山姆·福克斯设计与视觉艺术学院院长

title: Class Acts: Cela Lopez
summary_en: WashU senior Cela Lopez is studying political science so, of course, she’s interested in politics and policy. But what she really cares about is how we think about those topics.
title_cn: 华盛顿大学（圣路易斯）高年级学生塞拉·洛佩兹多项政治心理学研究取得进展 将赴西北大学攻读博士学位
